segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Right.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: OK, well I'd like to book for ...

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Hello everyone.
segments.zh: 大家好。我是梅根·贝克，AVT招聘公司的招聘顾问。我们公司专门从事农业和园艺领域的职位，比如新鲜食品生产、花园和公园维护等。这些领域确实提供一些非常特别的职业机会。首先，它们通常为那些不想被每周40小时工作束缚，但需要兼顾工作和其他责任（如育儿）的人提供机会——这对我们的许多求职者来说非常重要。有些人喜欢在乡村环境中工作，被植物和树木而不是建筑物包围，尽管我们不能保证这一点。但肯定有健康益处，尤其是在那些不需要整天坐着看屏幕的工作中——这对很多人来说是一个很大的好处。薪水有时也不错，尽管差异很大。在某些类型的工作中，你可能有出国旅行的机会，尽管这显然取决于工作，而且不是每个人都愿意这样做。当然，户外工作确实有其挑战。夏天还好，但天气寒冷多风时可能会非常不舒服。有些工作可能需要你相当健康，尽管有了现代技术，这已经不像以前那么重要了。健康和安全标准现在比以前高得多，所以与工作相关的事故更少。但如果你喜欢充满活力的城市环境，周围有很多人，这些工作可能不适合你——它们通常位于相当偏远的地区。有些人担心找不到合适的住处，但根据我们的经验，这通常没问题。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: My name's Megan Baker and I'm a recruitment consultant at AVT Recruitment specialists.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Now, our company specialises in positions that involve working in the agriculture and horticulture sectors, so that's fresh food production, garden and park maintenance and so on.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: And these sectors do provide some very special career opportunities.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: For a start, they often offer opportunities for those who don't want to be stuck with a 40-hour week, but need to juggle work with other responsibilities such as child care – and this is very important for many of our recruits.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Some people like working in a rural setting, surrounded by plants and trees instead of buildings, although we can't guarantee that.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: But there are certainly health benefits, especially in jobs where you're not sitting all day looking at a screen – a big plus for many people.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Salaries can sometimes be good too, although there's a lot of variety here.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: And you may have the opportunity in some types of jobs for travel overseas, although that obviously depends on the job, and not everyone is keen to do it.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Of course, working outdoors does have its challenges.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: It's fine in summer, but can be extremely unpleasant when it's cold and windy.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: You may need to be pretty fit for some jobs, though with modern technology that's not as important as it once was.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: And standards of health and safety are much higher now than they used to be, so there are fewer work-related accidents.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: But if you like a lively city environment surrounded by lots of people, these jobs are probably not for you – they're often in pretty remote areas.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: And some people worry about finding a suitable place to live, but in our experience, this usually turns out fine.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Now let me tell you about some of the exciting jobs that we have on our books right now.
segments.zh: 现在让我告诉你们一些我们目前正在招聘的令人兴奋的职位。一个是新鲜食品商业经理。我们的客户是一家非常大的新鲜食品生产商，为一系列顶级超市供货。他们在快节奏、低利润的环境中运营——那里的员工工作努力，但玩得也很尽兴，所以如果你性格善于社交，这可能适合你。我们有一个令人兴奋的农艺师职位，为农民提供作物营养、害虫防治以及农业实践最新法规等方面的建议。合适的人选有很好的机会迅速晋升，但要求申请者对农业领域有深入的了解。一家领先的超市正在寻找一名新鲜农产品采购员，合同期为12个月的产假替代。你需要有新鲜农产品行业的行政、规划和采购经验，作为回报，你将获得非常有竞争力的薪水。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: One is for a fresh food commercial manager.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Our client here is a very large fresh food producer supplying a range of top supermarkets.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: They operate in a very fast-paced environment with low profit margins – the staff there work hard, but they play hard as well, so if you've a sociable personality this may be for you.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: We have an exciting post as an agronomist advising farmers on issues such as crop nutrition, protection against pests, and the latest legislation on farming and agricultural practices.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: There are good opportunities for the right person to quickly make their way up the career ladder, but a deep knowledge of the agricultural sector is expected of applicants.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: A leading supermarket is looking for a fresh produce buyer who is available for a 12-month maternity cover contract.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: You need to have experience in administration, planning and buying in the fresh produce industry, and in return will receive a very competitive salary.

items.prompt: According to Megan, what are the TWO main advantages of working in the agriculture and horticulture sectors?

pairs.p: provide some very special career opportunities
pairs.note: 'advantages' 被替换为 'special career opportunities'，两者都表示好处。

pairs.p: don't want to be stuck with a 40-hour week
pairs.note: 原文几乎完全重复，强调灵活工作时间。
直接对应，指健康方面的好处。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问两个主要优势，定位句先总说'provide some very special career opportunities'，然后列举具体优势：灵活工作时间（don't want to be stuck with a 40-hour week）和健康益处（health benefits）。

items.prompt: According to Megan, what are the TWO main advantages of working in the agriculture and horticulture sectors?

pairs.p: provide some very special career opportunities
pairs.note: 题干问优势，原文用'provide special career opportunities'引出好处。
题干'advantages'对应原文'health benefits'，是具体优势之一。

pairs.p: opportunities for those who don't want to be stuck with a 40-hour week
pairs.note: 题干'advantages'对应原文灵活工作时间的好处，是另一优势。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句开头提到'provide some very special career opportunities'，随后列举具体好处，如灵活工作时间和健康益处，对应题干问的advantages。

items.prompt: Which TWO of the following are likely to be disadvantages for people working outdoors?

pairs.note: 'disadvantages' 被替换为 'challenges'，意思相同。
题干关键词 'working outdoors' 在原文中完全重复。
'disadvantages' 的具体表现之一 'unpleasant' 对应题干中的 'disadvantages'。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问 'working outdoors' 的 'disadvantages'，原文在 'working outdoors does have its challenges' 后列举了 'unpleasant when it's cold and windy' 等缺点，因此定位到此处。

items.prompt: Which TWO of the following are likely to be disadvantages for people working outdoors?

pairs.note: disadvantages 被替换为 challenges，意思相同。
题干中的 working outdoors 在原文中完全重复出现。

pairs.q: unpleasant when it's cold and windy
pairs.p: unpleasant when it's cold and windy
pairs.note: 原文直接描述了天气恶劣的缺点。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问户外工作的缺点，原文在 'working outdoors does have its challenges' 后列举了缺点，其中 'unpleasant when it's cold and windy' 对应选项 C。

items.prompt: What information does Megan give about each of the following job opportunities?

information 被替换为 tell you about，是动词短语替换名词。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问的是关于每个工作机会的信息，定位句开头说'let me tell you about some of the exciting jobs'，直接对应，因此定位到此处。

items.prompt: What information does Megan give about each of the following job opportunities?

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位到该职位。
